items.title: Google Cloud Introduces Cross-Engine Iceberg Support in BigQuery
items.summaryShort: Google Cloud Introduces Cross-Engine Iceberg Support in BigQuery. At the Apache Iceberg Summit last month, Google announced new interoperability features for Apache Iceberg in BigQuery.

items.title: Uber Improves Restaurant Recommendations Using Real-Time Signals and Listwise Ranking
items.summaryShort: Uber Improves Restaurant Recommendations Using Real-Time Signals and Listwise Ranking. Uber updates its Uber Eats Home Feed recommendation system using near real-time user sequence features and a Generative Recommender model.

items.title: InfoQ Launches Online AI Engineering Cohort and Certification for Senior Software Practitioners
items.summaryShort: InfoQ Launches Online AI Engineering Cohort and Certification for Senior Software Practitioners. InfoQ has launched a five-week online AI Engineering certification for senior practitioners working on production AI systems, covering RAG, age

items.title: Discord Rebuilds Database Operations Around Automation to Manage ScyllaDB at Massive Scale
items.summaryShort: Discord Rebuilds Database Operations Around Automation to Manage ScyllaDB at Massive Scale. Discord has detailed how it rebuilt its database operations around a new internal orchestration framework called the Scylla Control Plane (SCP), ena

items.title: xAI Releases Grok Skills and Updates Tool Calling Responses API
items.summaryShort: xAI Releases Grok Skills and Updates Tool Calling Responses API. xAI has released Grok Skills together with enhancements to the Responses API for Grok 4.3, enabling persistent custom expertise that the model retains across all conversations

items.title: SolarSquare in talks to raise up to $60M as India's rooftop solar market draws major VC interest
items.summaryShort: SolarSquare in talks to raise up to $60M as India's rooftop solar market draws major VC interest. SolarSquare could be valued at up to $500 million in the financing expected to close next month.

items.title: These special phone and app features can help protect you from spyware
items.summaryShort: These special phone and app features can help protect you from spyware. Apple, Meta, and Google offer special security modes that provide your devices more secure against targeted spyware attacks.

items.title: Ferrari is using IBM's AI to create F1 superfans
items.summaryShort: Ferrari is using IBM's AI to create F1 superfans. IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP take TechCrunch inside how they are redefining the fan experience.
